message.content:
@startuml
title VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)
caption CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction

actor User
participant Website
participant "Web Server" as WebServer
participant "Filesystem Server" as FileServer
database "PC Filesystem" as PCFS

User -> Website : opens

activate Website
Website -> WebServer : initialize
note right of Website
http://localhost:8080/
end note

activate WebServer
Website -> FileServer : initialize
note right of Website
http://localhost:8090/
end note

activate FileServer
FileServer -> PCFS : read
activate PCFS
PCFS --> FileServer : return\ndefault\ndirectory
note right of FileServer
.../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"
end note
deactivate PCFS

FileServer --> Website : provide\ndirectories
Website --> User : display\nSyncfusion\nFileManager\ncomponent

deactivate FileServer
deactivate WebServer
deactivate Website
@enduml
